sections.text: Siphons have several inherent limitations compared to pumps:
Atmospheric pressure in Minecraft can only lift fluid about 16 blocks. Beyond that height, the siphon effect breaks down. If you need to move fluid higher, use a Pipe Pump.

Siphon pressure is derived only from the fill level of the lower source pipe, multiplied by a small efficiency factor (default 0.5). A pump at 2000 mBar will always outperform a siphon at the same height.
The source pipe must already contain fluid for the siphon to work. You may need to fill it by hand or with a pump first.
Siphons only work when moving fluid upward after a downward path. Pure horizontal flow (or attempting to move fluid upward without gravity assist first) will not trigger siphon pressure.
